title: USD/JPY
text: USD/JPY at 159.24 — approaching the 160.00 level that has previously triggered BoJ verbal warnings; intervention risk rises on a sustained break above 160.

title: AUD/USD Retail Sentiment
text: AUD/USD sentiment at 13% long / 87% short — extreme short bias, contrarian reversal risk.

title: USD/JPY vs VIX Correlation Break
